title: Extracting Info Boxes
excerpt: Hello! Are there any way to extract data from info boxes? API?

posts.author: Yaroslav (Yaroslav)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello! Are there any way to extract data from info boxes? API?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Yaroslav

Welcome to the community! There is no API support for Infoboxes. In fact Infoboxes are going to disappear somewhere in the future. See Notes and Info Box support in API v2 - #17 by zlanich
